name: FINOS CALM Monorepo Discovered Architecture
description: Minimal static-discovery architecture for the FINOS Architecture as Code monorepo, focused on the primary CALM authoring, validation, Hub, UI, and storage components.

nodes.name: Architecture as Code Monorepo
nodes.description: FINOS CALM specification and tool monorepo.

nodes.name: Developer or Architect
nodes.description: Human user creating, validating, visualizing, and publishing CALM assets.

nodes.name: CALM Schemas and Examples
nodes.description: JSON schemas, patterns, controls, interfaces, sample architectures, and release or draft metadata under calm.

nodes.name: CALM CLI
nodes.description: Node CLI for generate, validate, template, docify, and AI assistant initialization.

nodes.name: CALM Shared Library
nodes.description: Shared validation, document loading, Spectral rules, template, docify, and resolver logic.

nodes.name: CALM Models Package
nodes.description: Type definitions and model classes for CALM documents.

nodes.name: CALM Widgets
nodes.description: Handlebars widget package for generated CALM documentation.

nodes.name: CALM Server
nodes.description: Standalone Express HTTP validation server exposing health and CALM validation endpoints.

nodes.name: CALM Hub API
nodes.description: Quarkus REST API for namespaces, architectures, patterns, flows, controls, decorators, schemas, search, ADRs, and user access.

nodes.name: CALM Hub MCP Endpoint
nodes.description: Embedded Quarkiverse MCP server exposed by CALM Hub.

nodes.name: CALM Hub UI
nodes.description: React and Vite UI for browsing, visualizing, searching, and managing CALM Hub content.

nodes.name: MongoDB
nodes.description: Default persistent store for CALM Hub using the calmSchemas database.

nodes.name: NitriteDB
nodes.description: Embedded standalone CALM Hub storage mode.

nodes.name: Keycloak
nodes.description: Local secure-profile OIDC provider for CALM Hub and Hub UI authentication.

nodes.name: CALM VS Code Extension
nodes.description: VS Code extension for preview, navigation, validation, tree view, and documentation generation workflows.

nodes.name: CALM Documentation Site
nodes.description: Docusaurus documentation site published to calm.finos.org.

nodes.name: Advent of CALM Site
nodes.description: Astro educational content site.

nodes.name: CALM AI Prompts and Tooling
nodes.description: Provider-specific prompt and configuration assets installed by calm init-ai.

nodes.name: CALMGuard
nodes.description: Next.js continuous compliance platform with dashboard, API routes, and AI agent orchestration.

nodes.name: CALMGuard Agent Squad
nodes.description: LLM-backed and deterministic agents for analysis, compliance mapping, risk scoring, pipelines, and remediation.

nodes.name: CalmStudio
nodes.description: SvelteKit visual CALM editor with canvas, code sync, import/export, and validation.

nodes.name: CalmStudio MCP Server
nodes.description: MCP server with stdio and HTTP transports for AI-driven architecture creation and editing.

nodes.name: GitHub
nodes.description: Source hosting, Actions CI, repository APIs, PR creation, and issue links.

nodes.name: LLM Providers
nodes.description: Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, and xAI providers used by CALMGuard.

nodes.name: AWS S3 and CloudFront
nodes.description: Static hosting and cache invalidation target for documentation workflows.

nodes.name: Docker Hub
nodes.description: Target registry for published CALM Hub container images.

nodes.name: Docker and Kubernetes Runtime
nodes.description: Container and Kubernetes deployment boundary found in Docker Compose and Kubernetes manifests.

nodes.name: Local CALM Documents
nodes.description: Architecture, pattern, template, timeline, ADR, and control files consumed by CALM tools.

relationships.description: Contains the CALM schema and specification assets.
Contains the primary CALM tools and libraries.
Contains the Hub backend and frontend workspaces.
Contains public documentation and educational websites.
Contains additional CALM suite applications.
Runs local CALM commands for generation, validation, templating, documentation, and AI setup.
Browses and manages Hub resources through the web UI.
Previews, navigates, validates, and documents CALM models inside VS Code.
Loads local architectures, patterns, timelines, templates, and mappings from the workspace.
Retrieves Hub documents when configured with a CALM Hub URL.
Loads allowlisted remote schema and document URLs, including calm.finos.org resources.
Delegates validation, generation, loaders, and templating to shared code.
Uses CALM model and type definitions.
Uses widgets for docify and template generation.
Validates CALM documents through shared validation logic.
Posts CALM architecture JSON to the standalone validation endpoint.
Calls Hub REST APIs under the /calm path.
Uses OIDC authorization code flow in secure mode.
Validates JWTs from Keycloak in the secure profile.
Uses MongoDB as the default persistent store.
Uses embedded NitriteDB for standalone storage mode.
Embeds MCP tools backed by the same CALM Hub stores.
MCP-capable clients call Hub tools at the MCP endpoint.
Deploys Hub and MongoDB through Docker Compose and Kubernetes manifests.
Uses shared and internal tooling for docify, validation, and rendering helpers.
Copies assistant configurations and prompt files for supported providers.
GitHub workflow builds Docusaurus and syncs static assets to S3, then invalidates CloudFront.
GitHub workflow builds and pushes the CALM Hub container image.
Fetches CALM files and creates remediation pull requests through GitHub APIs.
Streams live agent events to the dashboard using server-sent events.
Orchestrates deterministic and LLM-backed compliance agents.
Uses configured provider APIs for structured compliance analysis.
AI clients can drive CalmStudio architecture operations through MCP transports.
Imports and exports CALM JSON, SVG, PNG, and related artifacts.
